query:
UPDATE debt_collected_cache dc
JOIN debt_target_cache dt 
  ON dc.contract_external_id = dt.contract_external_id 
  AND dc.period_no = dt.period_no
SET dc.debt_range = dt.debt_range
WHERE dc.debt_range IS NULL
  AND dt.debt_range IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute
